entry.title: Logic Regression
entry.content:
Two classification

Optimize using gradient descent algorithms

Multi-classification

use OVR trick to implement multi-classification

entry.title: Support vector machine
entry.content:
Two classification

Optimize using gradient descent algorithms, you can choose the Stochastic gradient descent or not

The following python file need to be named “Support_Vector_Machine”.

Multi-classification

use OVR trick to implement multi-classification
